title: tui/event.rs: OSC escape sequence parsing has no length cap — long OSC can swallow message content
description: In strip_unsafe_chars (tui/src/ui.rs), the CSI path caps at 64 chars and resets. But the OSC path (EscState::Osc) has no length cap at all — it swallows characters until BEL or ESC+backslash. A relay message containing ESC+] followed by arbitrary text without a terminator will cause strip_unsafe_chars to swallow all subsequent characters in the message, including real content from later messages in the same render call. A malicious peer can blank out all displayed messages that follow theirs in the same render batch by opening an unterminated OSC sequence.
